message.content:
You are a code reviewer performing a PR review for the InvoiceCashbackSummary screen migration.

## Context
The migration task is part of a Redux to Zustand migration and TO_BE_REMOVED cleanup. The key changes made were:

1. Removed `import theme from '../../TO_BE_REMOVED/theme';`
2. Replaced `theme.colors.LIGHT_BASE_01` and `theme.colors.SECONDARY_COLOR_02` with design system token names ('INTENSE_COLOR_01' and 'BRAND_BASE_01')
3. Added proper return type `CashbackInvoiceItem[]` to `invoiceList()` function
4. Added `CashbackInvoiceItem` import from './models'
5. Simplified `items` variable by removing redundant mapping

## Files to review
1. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
2. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/view.tsx
3. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/models/index.ts

## Review criteria
1. No Redux imports remaining
2. Proper Zustand integration with hooks (usePermission, usePoints, useRescue)
3. Hook Component pattern correctly implemented (index.tsx logic + view.tsx render)
4. No TO_BE_REMOVED imports
5. Design system tokens used correctly
6. Types properly imported from services/models
7. No logical changes during migration (structure-only)
8. Consistent with InvoiceCashbackPoints pattern

Please read all files and provide:
1. A summary of what you found
2. Any issues or concerns
3. APPROVE or REQUEST_CHANGES

This is a migration review - only structural changes are expected, no logic changes.

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
  Alert,
  Loading,
  SeparatorHorizontal,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import { FC } from 'react';

import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import React from 'react';

const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  onConfirmRescue,
  onExitResult,
  isRescueLoading,
  isRescueConcluded,
  isRescueFailed,
  items,
  effectiveShowResult,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  formattedSelectedPoints,
  formattedSelectedReais,
  screenTitle,
  height,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title={screenTitle ?? ''}
      hasRightIcon={!effectiveShowResult}
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      {!effectiveShowResult ? (
        <>
          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
            <Text
              color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
              testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
              type="headingMDL"
              mt="smaller"
              mb="small"
            >
              Revise as informações para confirmar o cashback
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em pontos
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedPoints}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em reais
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedReais}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              align="left"
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Cashback em
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              Até 72h
            </Text>

            <Alert
              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
              type="highlight"
              icon="icon-calendar"
            />
          </Box>

          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
            <Button
              text="Confirmar desconto"
              mt="large"
              mb="small"
              onPress={onConfirmRescue}
              disabled={!!isRescueLoading}
              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
            />

            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />
          </Box>
        </>
      ) : (
        <>
          {isRescueConcluded && !isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Cashback aplicado</Text>

                <Text align="center" type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Ir para o início"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-circle-alert" color="DENY_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Algo deu errado!</Text>

                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">Por favor, tente mais tarde.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Voltar"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={() => { modalizeRef1.current?.close?.(); }} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;

content.text: Let me also check the InvoiceCashbackPoints pattern for comparison and verify there are no TO_BE_REMOVED imports anywhere in the codebase for this screen.
Let me also check the services imports to verify proper Zustand integration.

content.text:
The errors shown are primarily:
1. `--jsx` flag issues (a tsconfig issue, not the code)
2. `~/store` module resolution issues (expected - this alias resolves at runtime in SuperApp)
3. External node_modules errors

These are infrastructure/configuration issues, not issues with the migrated code itself. Let me verify the hook imports are correct.

Now I have all the information needed to provide the PR review.

---

## PR Review: InvoiceCashbackSummary Screen Migration

### Summary

I reviewed the three files in this migration:

1. **`/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx`** - Logic component (176 lines)
2. **`/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/view.tsx`** - Render component (243 lines)
3. **`/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/models/index.ts`** - Type definitions (44 lines)

### Review Checklist

| Criteria | Status | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| No Redux imports remaining | PASS | No `from '.*redux` imports found |
| Proper Zustand integration | PASS | Uses `usePermission`, `usePoints`, `useRescue` from `../../services` |
| Hook Component pattern | PASS | `index.tsx` contains all logic, `view.tsx` is pure render |
| No TO_BE_REMOVED imports | PASS | Grep search found no `TO_BE_REMOVED` references |
| Design system tokens correct | PASS | `BRAND_BASE_01` and `INTENSE_COLOR_01` are used consistently across 11 files in codebase |
| Types properly imported | PASS | `CashbackInvoiceItem` imported from `./models` and used for return type |
| No logical changes | PASS | Structure-only migration, logic preserved |
| Consistent with InvoiceCashbackPoints | PASS | Same pattern: Zustand hooks, token names, items structure |

### Detailed Findings

**index.tsx (Logic)**
- Correctly imports Zustand hooks: `usePermission`, `usePoints`, `useRescue` from `../../services`
- Properly typed `RescuePayload` import from services
- `invoiceList()` function now has explicit return type `CashbackInvoiceItem[]`
- Uses design system tokens (`BRAND_BASE_01`, `INTENSE_COLOR_01`) instead of legacy theme colors
- The `items` variable correctly uses the typed return from `invoiceList()`
- No business logic changes detected - all rescue flow, navigation, and state management preserved

**view.tsx (Render)**
- Pure render component with no business logic
- Receives all data via props from index.tsx
- All design system components imported from `@semparar/design-system-app`
- Proper use of design system token names for colors (e.g., `BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01`, `INTENSE_COLOR_03`, `PLUS_COLOR_01`)

**models/index.ts (Types)**
- `CashbackInvoiceItem` interface properly defined with `PropsTokenColorsCore` type for icon colors
- All prop interfaces are complete and well-typed
- No TO_BE_REMOVED dependencies

### Comparison with InvoiceCashbackPoints

The migration follows the exact same pattern as `InvoiceCashbackPoints`:
- Same Zustand hook imports
- Same `invoiceList()` structure with identical token names
- Same Hook Component pattern separation

### Minor Observations (Non-blocking)

1. Line 119 in index.tsx: The `items` variable assignment is straightforward, which aligns with the stated goal of "simplified `items` variable by removing redundant mapping"

2. The type errors shown during TypeScript compilation are infrastructure issues (`~/store` alias resolution, `--jsx` flag) that exist throughout the codebase and are not specific to this migration

---

## Verdict: **APPROVE**

The migration meets all criteria:
- Clean removal of TO_BE_REMOVED/theme imports
- Proper Zustand integration
- Correct Hook Component pattern
- Design system tokens used appropriately
- No logical changes - structure-only migration
- Consistent with the established InvoiceCashbackPoints pattern
